title: colutea × variabilis
intro: Colutea × variabilis, also known as the variable bladderpod, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Colutea × variabilis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Colutea × variabilis typically involve drying and grinding the plant's leaves and roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
